rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical 6/10 score and the same core assessment: solid software development experience with gaps in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure. The differences (e.g. 'scaling engineering teams' vs 'executive/leadership role', or reshuffled strength phrasings about programming languages and scalable systems) are reworded variations on the same points and fall within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant references the candidate's location, nationality, or Brazil, and no concern or score change keys off the demographic change.
